entities.name: PADDY RICE
entities.description: The crop species being evaluated for grain quality traits using non-destructive imaging.

entities.name: CHAFFINESS
entities.description: A physical grain trait of rice evaluated using X-ray imaging.

entities.name: CHALKY RICE KERNEL PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A physical grain trait of rice, also known as CRK%, evaluated using X-ray imaging.

entities.name: HEAD RICE RECOVERY PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A physical grain trait of rice, also known as HRR%, evaluated using X-ray imaging.

entities.name: X-RAY RADIOGRAPHY
entities.description: A non-destructive imaging technology used for the assessment of rice grain quality traits.

entities.name: COMPUTER-VISION BASED METHODS
entities.description: Analytical approaches used to predict physical rice traits from X-ray images.

entities.name: X-RAY IMAGE SEGMENTATION
entities.description: A computer-vision technique used to isolate parts of an X-ray image for analysis.

entities.name: FEATURES-BASED MULTI-LINEAR MODELS
entities.description: A predictive modeling approach used to estimate rice grain traits.

entities.name: THRESHOLDING
entities.description: A computer-vision technique used to segment or classify image pixels based on intensity.

entities.name: PCA BASED PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Principal Component Analysis based models used for predicting traits from individual grains.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop characteristics for better yield and quality.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input, which can be improved through better breeding.
